11.05.2015. The said limitation of 3 years is provided under Article 
52 to the Schedule of the Limitation Act. The High Court also took 
the same view and accordingly held that the proceedings under the 
PP Act having been initiated by issuance of notice for the first time 
on 12.08.2015 the same would be barred by limitation. It also placed
